-----------------------------------------------------------------------  Dear Temu user, We are committed to providing you with a safe and trustworthy experience on Temu. To support this, we are updating our Terms of Use, including the Community Guidelines, to provide you with greater clarity about (1) how our platform is safeguarded, and (2) how content is presented, and the control options available to you. The updated Terms of Use will become effective from April 19, 2026. You can read the updated Terms of Use here. If you do not agree to these changes, you are free to stop your use of the services before these changes become effective. By continuing to use Temu's services, you acknowledge and agree to the updated Terms of Use. Thank you for being part of the Temu community. We appreciate your support and remain committed to improving your experience with us. The Temu Team This is a legal notice, which is why you are receiving it even if you have opted out of our marketing emails.       Find us on NOTE: This is an automatically generated email, please do not reply. Office address: First Floor, 25 St Stephens Green, Dublin 2, Ireland Please note, returns will not be accepted at this address. If you want to return items, please request a return and use Temu’s label. Click to view more details. Please contact customer service if you have any questions.
